info.title: MiniMax Overseas - Image to Video
info.description:
MiniMax Overseas image-to-video subdocument. This subdocument describes the subset of fields currently implemented in the project and mapped to the official MiniMax image-to-video capability.

The platform entry path is `/v1/videos`, and the gateway ultimately calls upstream `POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/video_generation`. Public `image` / `input_reference` fields are mapped to upstream `first_frame_image`.

post.description:
This endpoint only applies to the MiniMax Overseas image-to-video capability.

Current support boundary:
- Supported models: `MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3`, `MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3-Fast`, `MiniMax-Hailuo-02`, `I2V-01-Director`, `I2V-01-live`, `I2V-01`
- Implemented fields: `model`, `image`, `prompt`, `seconds`, `size`
- `prompt` can be omitted for this capability; whether it is required depends on the model
- Official extension fields are passed through under `metadata.*`

value.prompt: The girl looks at the camera and smiles.

200.description: Submission succeeded. Returns the unified OpenAI-style video task object.

400.description: Invalid request parameters, for example missing `image` or sending a model that does not support image to video.

image.description: First-frame image URL or Data URL. The gateway maps it to upstream `first_frame_image`.

seconds.description: Requested duration in seconds. The gateway maps it to upstream `duration`.

size.description: Requested resolution. The gateway maps it to upstream `resolution`.

metadata.description: Pass-through area for official MiniMax extension fields. The current project supports `prompt_optimizer`, `fast_pretreatment`, `callback_url`, and `aigc_watermark`.
